description: The currently displayed image is an irrelevant placeholder interface button marked with the text "Check for updates", which is completely inconsistent with the provided research context of hypereutectic TiB₂ reinforced low-density high-modulus steel. No valid materials science-related academic figure content, including microstructure characterization results, mechanical property test curves, finite element simulation outputs, or phase structure diagrams, can be extracted from this non-scientific interface icon, so the target figure information for the steel research cannot be identified or analyzed based on the current provided visual content.
